step.title: Load UX spec
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/ux-spec.md and extract all user flows, wireframes, and interaction patterns.

step.title: Evaluate WCAG compliance
step.action: Evaluate each screen and interaction against WCAG 2.1 AA success criteria.

step.title: Identify accessibility issues
step.action: Document each issue with severity (critical, major, minor), affected component, and WCAG criterion violated.

step.title: Recommend fixes
step.action: For each issue, provide a specific, actionable recommendation to achieve compliance.

step.title: Produce review report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with review findings.
